column1: # Partition table for cardputer_ai on Cardputer ADV (ESP32-S3FN8
# The model and tokenizer are embedded into the firmware via .incbin
# app partition has to be big enough to hold the code + ~3 MB of model data.
# Single factory app (no OTA slots) maximises the room available.
# bmorcelli/Launcher writes the new firmware to offset 0x10000 and replaces
# the running partition table on install (PMan honors the new scheme)
# this layout activates as soon as the user installs the .bin.
